description: High Security – 5 digital combination padlock offers 100000 combinations. Keep it safe – secure enough to protect your property. High Resistant Material – This padlock is made from zinc alloy with durability, anti-rust, weatherproof. Hard to cut – it is resistant to cutting and breaking. Easy to Use – Rotary code switch makes it easy to set and reset your personal number. No keys needed – Just follow our simple to follow instructions to set and reset the lock. Compact design – This combination lock has a simple design with a smooth curved shackle. Easy to set/reset – the code has a raised profile and large numbers to make resetting and setting the numbers easy . Multiple Uses – This padlock is suitable for many different indoor and outdoor use, ideal for gates, sheds, gym work and school lockers, garage, toolbox, luggage etc. Size 64mm cylindrical unit with 25mm diameter Shackle depth 34mm Shackle thickness 7mm
